name: Mob | Evolutions
description: Mob is the evolution npc, here you evolve your units.

name: Guts | Crafting
description: Guts is the crafting npc for rune stones, and crafting materials. All craftable materials are listed in the Materials list.

name: Frieren | Level Rewards
description: Frieren is the level reward NPC, every 5 levels you can claim level rewards at this unit. The rewards contain gems and rerolls.

name: Boros | Tournaments
description:
This is a Mode where you can pick between Ranked and Causal. This also has 2 Different stages where both are 30 Wave Gamemodes on Casual and 50 Wave Gamemodes on Ranked.

Playing on the ranked gamemode has certain restrictions, making you unable to use "Robin (HSR), Toru (Wonder Of U), Anos (Light Novel Arc), Hajun (God Of Universe), Matsuri (Love Pillar), & Vivian (Banshee).

Along with these restrictions, all units will receive a 50% range reduction. There are also Zones making you unable to place units in certain areas unless you pay to open the zone. If you play Ranked your Time will be added on the Leaderboard

**Z City:**

- **x20 Trophy**
- **x10000 Alien Coins**
- **x1 Boros Armor (1%)**
- **x1 Boros Chair (1%)**
- **x1 Alien Crystal (1%)**

**Alien Spaceship Drops**

- **x1 Alien Core (1%)**
- **x1 Alien Broken Core (1%)**
- **x10000 Alien Crystals**
- **x20 Tournament Cup**

There is also a shop where you are able to buy Unit frames or Inventory Capacity.

name: Albedo | Lab
description:
Albedo is the Lab NPC, here you can sacrifice exclusives, secrets, mythics and legendaries for Trait Rerolls.

Exclusives = 25 Rerolls

Secrets = 15 Rerolls

Mythics = 5 Rerolls

Legendary = 1 Reroll at a 40% chance.

name: Garou | OPM Event
description:
**Cosmic Annihilation [Cosmic Annihilation]**

30 Waves Gamemode which you can play up to 6 players. The Boss (God) spawns at wave 0 with 3.6B where his hp increases by 1.65x his current hp every 25 seconds.

**Saitama Drops**:

- x1 Titan Strength Barbell (3%)
- x1 Casual Combat Gloves (3%)
- x1 Singularity Training Barbell (3%)
- x1 Hero's Training Cape (3%)
- x1 Hero's Casual Uniform (3%)
- x10000 Coins
- x10000 Alien Coins

**Blast Drops**:

- x1 Alien Core (1%)

- x1 Hero's Training Cape (3%)
- x1 Dimensional Vanguard Armor (3%)
- x1 Dimensional Core Cube (3%)
- x1 Vision Of The Dimensional Hero (3%)
- x1 Divine Spatial Core (3%)
- x10000 Coins
- x10000 Alien Coins

**Garou Drops**:

- x1 Primordial Monster Cell (2%)

- x10000 Coins
- x10000 Alien Coins

**Sai Akuto Drops**:

(Note : If you Beat the gun devil Boss at wave at earlier waves than 50 (for example at wave 20-40 it ends the game instantly in a victory)

the boss attacks your units, dealing damage, stunning them and reduces your yen each time he attacks.

If your unit has any passives that modifies or reduces the boss's HP directly, that unit will instantly br eliminated while the boss remains completely unaffected.

World Boss reset every 1 hour with 2 unique reward rotations.

name: Wordline (Forbidden Forest)
description:
- **Forbidden Forest:**
- **30 intense waves in the brand new worldline against powerful enemies, to obtain low chance drops aswell as currency to evolve the brand new units and craft the new artifacts**
- **The event features 3 new effects that all units have**
  - **Green Shield - Regenerates shield on enemies by +1 (Pink Shield)**
  - **Pink Shield - Normal Shield**
  - **Red Shield - Anti Active Skill Damage from all units**

name: World Rush
description:
- **Fleurdelys (The Martyred Maiden) is aswell from the game; Wuthering Waves as Cartethiya's alter ego.**

**Fleurdelys is acquired from evolving Cartethiya with the Crown of Fleurdelys acquired from the World Rush Event "The Wheel of the Broken Fate"**

- _Fight against Cartethiya and later Fleurdelys to acquire the Crown of Fleurdelys; You must beat the bosses and Wave 50._

_In this stage, bosses can attack your units and have a high chance to teleport to other locations on the stage. (5 locations in total)_ _After Cartethiya is defeated, Fleurdelys will spawn and replace her. Defeat_ **both** _bosses to win the stage._ _All enemies in this stage have a 95% Damage Reduction._

name: Chronicles Of Timeless Eternity 1
description:
**Chronicles of Timeless Eternity**

 This event features Frieren from Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End and Kurumi Tokisaki from Date A Live.

- **Frieren**

**Beyond Journey**

- **100% Difficulty**

> _26.00%_ _**|**_ _x1 Ruined Marble Pillar_
> _26.00%_ _**|**_ _x1 Clockwork Relic Core_
> _26.00%_ _**|**_ _x1 Ancient Stone Dome_
> _25,000 Gems & 5 Perfect Stat Cubes_

- **1000% Difficulty**

> _49.40%_ _**|**_ _x2 Ruined Marble Pillar_
> _49.40%_ _**|**_ _x2 Clockwork Relic Core_
> _49.40%_ _**|**_ _x2 Ancient Stone Dome_
> _100,000 Gems & 20 Perfect Stat Cubes_

- _Fight against Frieren starting from Wave 1, and survive until Wave 50._
  _In this stage, Frieren will attack and inflict Stun on your units._
  _All enemies take 95% less damage._
  _All skills on your units have a 2× cooldown duration._
  _You cannot place units of the “Buff” subtype in this stage._
  _The maximum amount of Yen you can hold at one time is ¥100,000._

**Frieren Questline**
_Defeat **Frieren** up to **50 times.**_
_Play_\* Infinite Mode Stories\** up to **Wave 500** on the following maps:
**Large Village, Hollow Land, Monster City, and Academy Doujin.**
Complete the **Beyond Journey** event stage up to 50 times.
Obtain the ancient items* **Ruined Marble Pillar, Clockwork Relic Core, and Ancient Stone Dome 15 times each** _to evolve her._

- _Upon the completion of this stage, you will receive 5,000,000 Gems, 5,000,000 Coins, and the Sweet Feast Crepe, which is used to evolve Frieren._

name: Chronicles Of Timeless Eternity 2
description:
- **Kurumi**
- **Zafkiel's Clock Tower**
- \*\*100% Difficulty \*\*

> _10.00%_ **|** _x1 Kurume (Time Spirit)_
> _26.00%_ **|** _x1 Fragment of the Sixth Hour_
> _26.00%_ **|** _x1 Shattered Dial Core_
> _26.00%_ **|** _x1 Broken Ninth Hour Relic_
> _25,000 Gems, 25,000 Coins and 5 Perfect Stat Cubes_

- \*\*1000% Difficulty \*\*

> _19.00%_ **|** _x1 Kurume (Time Spirit)_
> _49.40%_ **|** _x2 Fragment of the Sixth Hour_
> _49.40%_ **|** _x2 Shattered Dial Core_
> _49.40%_ **|** _x2 Broken Ninth Hour Relic_
> _100,000 Gems, 100,000 Coins and 20 Perfect Stat Cubes_

- _Fight against Kurumi and her clone starting from Wave 1, and survive until Wave 50._
  _In this stage, Kurumi will frequently attack and inflict Stun._
  _Kurumi also applies an effect that massively increases the SPA of all units. To remove this effect, you must destroy all clocks scattered around the map._
  _All enemies take 95% less damage from units._
  _All skills have 2× cooldown duration._
  _There are two bosses in this stage: Kurumi’s Clone and the real Kurumi. Players must locate and defeat both bosses to successfully clear the stage._

**Kurumi's Questline**
_Defeat Kurumi up to 30 times._
_Use the Clock in Zafkiel’s Clock Tower up to 20 times._
_Obtain Fragment of the Sixth Hour, Shattered Dial Core, and Broken Ninth Hour Relic 5 times each._

- _Upon the completion of this stage, you will receive 5,000,000 Gems, 5,000,000 Coins, and the Golden Core of Judgement, which is used to evolve Kurume (Time Spirit) obtained from the event stage._

name: Over Heaven Event
description:
**• in order to get Dio and Jotaro Go to summon you'll see escanor npc interact with him**
**and you'll see a new banner called "Overheaven banner" Or trading. The pity For Both Dio and Jotaro is 25k Which is you need 12.5m new currency to get to pity and have a chance to get Dio or Jotaro. The max you can get of the new currency is 100m.**

**• For the new stage if you want to gain more currency kill both Dio and Pucci For 50k-60k presents the higher the hits left the higher the rewards, and for more Collect the presents scattered around the map collect them for 10k present each collect of those presents is 10k**

**• And for the mechanics of the stages pucci and Dio can kill your units so I suggest to bring units that are not killable example "Gilgamesh" He's immune to Dio skill but he's not immune to pucci ability but bring him for hits he's gonna help you a lot as you progress and helping you defeating pucci and Dio.**

**• The Dio npc is located in the middle of the lobby map as soon as you load into  the game you'll see him standing right in the middle interact with him to play the new event.**

name: Devourer Throne
description:
**Devourer Throne**

_Stage Information_

**All normal enemies in this stage have a 90% Defense. They are completely immune to ALL Ultimate/Active Skill damage.**

**The boss Dragon Kakuja has 3 variants. After defeating one, one next variant will spawn in sequence: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 1 (loop).**

**The Dragon Kakuja's body is completely invulnerable. You cannot attack or damage any part except for its head.**

**You may choose a team at the start of the stage: Rimuru, Ainz, or Kaneki. Each team summons a unique army that assists you during the battle.**

**Evolve item drops depend on the team you select.**

**Evolve Item Drops**

_Rimuru Team:_

**Lonefang Blade-25%, Abyssal Wing-15%, Frosty Slime - 15%, Demon Lord Throne-15%, Milim-10%, Honey Bottle-20%**

_Ainz Team:_

**Phantom Glow Skull (1-10000)-10%, Ainz-30%, Lord Staff-25%, Aegis of Seraph-15%, Crimson Heart-15%, Royal Crimson Emblem-15%**

_Kaneki Team:_

**Warlord of the Abyss-50%, Scarlet Doom Star-25%, Cursed Blood Eye-25%**

name: Yuji (Modulo)
description:
_**Yuji (Modulo) is inspired by Itadori Yuji from Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo Manga**_

---

#### _How to get Yuji (Modulo)_

_**You get him from the portal that you get from Trinity of Destruction Event (Shibuya).**_ [https://trello.com/c/eF3JYA0H/329-shibuya-portal](https://trello.com/c/eF3JYA0H/329-shibuya-portal "smartCard-inline")

---

_**Passives**_

#### Combat Imitation

_**Every time Yuji attacks an enemy, He will increase total damage by 3% of the enemy's HP (or 6% if the enemy has more than 50% HP). If Yuji kills an enemy with this attack, He gains +5 Cursed Energy (capped at 100) and increases his damage by 4% (capped at 80%).**_

‌

#### Perfect Vessel Body

_**When Yuji does a Black Flash, he will enter a special state that buffs his ATK by +100%, RNG by +25%. While in this state, everytime Yuji attacks there will be a 20% chance to increase total damage by 3% of enemy's HP.**_

‌

#### **Cursed Flames Pressure**

_**When Yuji attacks an enemy, he has a 100% chance to inflict burning, enemies affected by Burning takes damage every 1 second for 6 seconds, totalling 4% of their HP (this damage can be increased by Burning damage buffs). If Yuji kills a burning enemy, it causes a Cursed Energy Explosion that deals full AoE damage, dealing 2% HP to all enemies within range.**_

‌

#### **Black Flash Mastery**

_**Every time Yuji attacks an enemy, there is a 25% chance to trigger Black Flash, dealing 10% of current enemy's MaxHP and increasing Yuji's damage by 6% for 10 seconds (capped at 60%). If Yuji performs 3 Black Flashes in a row, he enters Flash State for 12 seconds, increasing Black Flash chance from 25% to 50%.**_

‌

#### Technique Replication

_**Every time Yuji attacks, he has a 20% to perform a full AoE attack. Enemies hit by it will take 10% of their HP as damage.**_

#### Combat Adaptation

_**If Yuji attacks the same enemy 5 times consecutively, he enters a state where every attack increases hi total damage by 5% of the enemy's Max HP for 8 seconds. It Yuji kills an enemy while in this state, it triggers an AoE explosion around the enemy that deals damage based on Yuji's RNG, dealing 5% HP to all enemies within range.**_

#### **Guardian Blessing**

_**This unit cannot be stunned.**_

---

_**Abilities;**_

### **Divine Flame: Open**

_**While the skill is active, Yuji constantly deals +999% of ATK as damage and inflict ' 'Burning 'on enemies (This Burning lasts for 6 seconds and deals burning damage) the damage of the burn will be 5% of total damage dealt on that enemy.**_

### **Dismantle: World Slash**

_**Deal 60,000% of ATK as damage and inflict 'Bledding' on enemies (lasts for 6 seconds and deals bleeding damage every 0.5s) the damage of the bleed will be 5% of (Unit's ATK +15,000%) dealt on that enemy.**_

---

name: Aizen (Final Muken)
description:
Aizen (Final Muken) is inspired by Aizen Sosuke from Bleach

---

_How to get Aizen_

_**You get him from Special Banner (Gem Banner) and he's a mythic there, after that you'll need to evo him 2 times. His 1st evo material is from crafting at guts npc, and 2nd evo materials is from the Aizen Muken Capsules**_ [https://trello.com/c/hzMK7AvR/330-aizen-muken-capsule](https://trello.com/c/hzMK7AvR/330-aizen-muken-capsule "smartCard-inline")  _**that you get from Trinity of Destruction Event Shop.**_

---

_Passives_

### Hogyoku Evolution

_**Every time Aizen attacks, there is a 50% chance to add 4% of enemy's max HP to the total damage. If the 50% is triggered, the next attack will have a 75% chance to add 20% of enemy's HP to the total damage. (Will reset even if 75% doesn't trigger).**_

#### Kyoka Suigetsu: Complete Hypnosis

_**Everytime Aizen attacks, there is a 25% chance to add 15% of enemy's current HP to the total damage. If the 25% is triggered there will be another 50% chance to add another 15% of enemy's current HP to the total damage — meaning this passive can add up to 30% of current enemy's HP total.**_

### Guardian Blessing

_**This unit cannot be stunned.**_

---

_**Abilities**_

#### Hado #90: Black Coffin

_**Stun all enemies for 35 seconds and deal 50,000% of ATK as damage once.**_

#### **Hado #99: Goryūtenmetsu**

_**While this skill is active, constantly deal 1,111% of ATK as damage to all enemies in the stage.**_

name: Yhwach (Soul King)
description:
Yhwach (Soul King) is a based by Yhwach from Bleach

---

_How to obtain Yhwach (Soul King)_
**Get his base form (Secret 1%) and first evo item Almighty Power (Secret 10%) from Kingdom of Wandenreich raid. For his second Evo you need materials from the portal that you get from Trinity of Destruction (Soul Society).** [https://trello.com/c/KFCyvm2K/328-soul-society-sealed-district-portal](https://trello.com/c/KFCyvm2K/328-soul-society-sealed-district-portal "smartCard-inline")

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

##### _Passive_

###

**Power of the Soul King**

**Everytime he attacks, he will 'Consume' 10% of enemy's HP (main target only), and convert that 10% into his ATK buff. (Capped at 2,000%)**

### **The Almighty**

**Everytime Yhwach attacks, he will have a 50% chance to 'Predict' and another 5% chance for that 'Predict' to turn into 'Choose' the future. When Yhwach 'Predict' the future, he will increase his total damage by 10% of enemy's HP. But if he 'Choose' the future, the enemy (only affects main target) will instantly be inflicted with Instant Death' - which makes them.. well.. dead.**

### **Guardian Blessing**

**This unit cannot be stunned.**

---

_Abilities_

**Sankt Altar**

**Deal 50,000% of ATK as damage and make enemies slowdown by 50% for 60 seconds.**

#### **Allmächtig**

**While the skill is active, constantly deal 1,111% of ATK as damage to all enemies.**

---

---

### **Unit Base Info:**

**1 Placement:**

**Placement; Ground**

**AOE: Circle AOE**

name: Darkness Devil (Fear of Dark)
description:
Darkness Devil (Fear of Dark) is obtained from the [https://trello.com/c/FF16XsqZ](https://trello.com/c/FF16XsqZ "smartCard-inline")  with a 0.1% chance. Hes based of the Darkness Devil from Chainsawman

---

## Passives/Abilities:

**Abyssal Devil: All attacks deal 100% Dark Damage , immune to Stun and boss attacks, deals +100% Damage to bleeding enemies, and instantly reduces Cooldown -25% when hitting bleeding enemies. If not attacking, cooldown returns to normal.**

**Cooldown: 180s**

**Deals +500% Damage and has +500% Range, hitting all enemies on the map**

name: Featherine (Aurora)
description:
Featherine (Aurora) is a Guardian obtained from [https://trello.com/c/KjVx7atM](https://trello.com/c/KjVx7atM "smartCard-inline")  as a 1% drop. Shes a Character based from Featherine from Umineko When They Cry.

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Loop of Eternity If Featherine is killed by a Boss, that Boss is instantly returned to its starting position, and Featherine's HP is fully restored.**

**Reality Rewrite When attacking enemies within range, has a 2% chance to completely recalculate enemy HP, randomly setting it to between x1.25 and x3 lower than its current value.**

**Divine Reflection When a Boss attacks her, she reflects the damage back with knockback equal to her base Damage.**

**Eternal Blessing Featherine cannot be stunned by Bosses. Allies within her range gain +33% Damage Buff while she remains nearby. The buff is lost if she leaves the range or disappears.**

**Ability: Metaphysical Revelation**

**Cooldown: 100s**

**Upon activation, all allied units within range are converted into Damage Power for Featherine (+2% Damage each, up to +500% total). Then deals a single strike to all enemies on the map, increasing her Damage against them by +565% (does not amplify self Damage).**

---

name: Jotaro Kujo (Over Heaven)
description:
- **Jotaru Kujo (Over Heaven) is inspired by Jotaro Kujo from the Game; JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Eyes of Heaven.**
- **How to Obtain the Unit**

> **Available through: Over Heaven Banner**
> **Rarity: Guardian Unit**
> **Drop Rate: 0.0045%**
> **Requirement: Player must be Level 10 to summon**

---

- Passives
- **Star Platinum Beyond Fate**

> _All attacks by **Jotaro Over Heaven** are guaranteed_ **Critical Hits** _, and all_ **Critical Damage** _is converted into_ **True Damage**.
>
> _Every 5 attacks, unleash a strike dealing_ **600% ATK** _as_ **True Damage** _to the main target, and_ **300% ATK** _to surrounding enemies._
>
> _All enemies hit take_ **+25% increased damage** _from all sources for **4 seconds.**_
>
> _If the main target is a_ **Boss** _or_ **World Boss**, _the 5th attack deals an additional_ **+500% ATK** _damage to that boss only._

- ‌
  - **I Decide the Outcome**

> Ⅱ
> _When_ **Jotaro Over Heaven** _attacks the same enemy_
> **5 consecutive times**, _the next attack instantly deals_ **+9000% ATK(BaseATK)** _damage to the main target._

---

- **Control; Abilities**
  _1s Cooldown_
- ‌
  - **Reality Overwrite**

> Ⅰ
> **Stuns** _all enemies on the map for_ **10 seconds.** _While active, enemies continuously take_ **4% of current HP** _as damage._

- ‌
  - **Star Platinum: Timestop**

> Ⅱ
> **Stuns** _all enemies on the map for_ **25 Seconds.** _Jotaro gains_ **100% Critical Chance** _, and each hit deals_ **10% of enemies current HP** _as damage._

---

name: Dio Brando (Over Heaven)
description:
**Dio Brando (Over Heaven)  is inspired from Game JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Eyes of Heaven.**

_**To obtain this unit you must have either had the old dio which transferred into the new dio or obtain the new dio from the JJBA Banner.**_

---

# **Passives/Abilities:**

### Heaven Is Mine

Heaven Rewrite: Each attack deals True Damage equal to 6% of the target's current HP.
Each time this effect deals True Damage, gain 1 Authority Stack (up to 20 stacks).
Each stack increases all damage dealt by DIO OVER HEAVEN by +3%.
At 20 stacks, enter Over Heaven Ascension for 12 seconds:
\-Time Stop triggers automatically every 5 seconds for 2 seconds.

- Total damage increased by +60%\*\*

### Absolute Time Dominion Absolute Time Dominion:

Every 7 seconds, time is stopped within attack range for 2 seconds.
During Time Stop:
\-Attacks have no SPA delay. -Damage increased by +150%.
\-Each attack deals additional True Damage equal to 2% of enemy HP.
Enemies are inflicted with Temporal Shatter, causing them to take +40% damage from all sources for 5 seconds

- Heaven Rewrite now scales with enemy Max HP instead of current HP.
  After Ascension ends, Authority resets and DIO enters Reality Fatigue for 10 seconds, during which Authority cannot be gained, but True Damage still
  applies.\*\*

### **Heaven's Knives Inflicts Bleed**

**(persists until the enemy dies),  (180s** cd)
dealing 3% of current HP as damage continuously. Bleed power increases each time this skill is used. stacking up to
100%.
Also attacks all enemies
dealing 11% of their current HP as damage.

### Road Roller Stops time for all

enemies on the stage for 60 seconds.
During this time, enemies continuously take 3% of current HP as damage. (**200s** cd)
\*\*

---

name: Shinra (Banshoman)
description:
**(Shinra (Banshoman) is a guardian type unit  he is based off shinra from fire force)**

---

**Obtainment: look for him around the lobby and after looking you will need to complete his quest upon talking to him you will need to do the new event Called "Three Gods Boss" the event change every hour in order to get the correct scroll that Shinra needs And so on.**

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

### **Banshoman:Overheat Engine:**

Each attack grants 1 Acceleration Stack for 6 seconds,

**Upon reaching 25 stacks, Shinra enters Bansho: Absolute Overheat for 7 seconds**.

**During Absolute Overheat**:

**-All attacks become Large AoE with unlimited Pierce.**
**-Attacks apply Burn with 100% chance.**
**-Burn is upgraded to Absolute Burn, dealing 12% of current HP as Fire Damage per second (6% for bosses)**.

**-Every attack additionally deal True Fire Damage equal to 22% of current HP**.

**When Absolute Overheat ends, Shinra releases Adolla Final ignition, dealing True Fire Damage equal to 35% of current HP to all enemies**.

**All enemies are inflicted with Burn Lock for 5 seconds**.

### **Adolla Flame Collapse:**

**Enemies within range are afflicted with Adolla Burn for 4 seconds (duration refreshes when hit).**
**It deal Fire damage equal to 8% of current HP per second (4% for Bosses)**.

**reduces movement speed by 30%, and reduces attack speed by 20% (maximum)**.

**Targets affected by Burn take 75% Increased damage from Shinra**.

**Each time Burn deals damage, there is a 40% chance to trigger Chain ignition**,

**Which deal True Fire Damage equal to 18% of the target's current HP to surrounding enemies and refreshes all Adolla Burn duration to 4 seconds**.

### **This status effect cannot be removed**.

### **Control:**

### Skill 1 - Soul Manipulation
• Remove 50% of enemies current HP
• Stuns them for 20 seconds: \*\*

### Skill 2 - Life Creation
**• Attacks all enemies currently active on the stage**
• Deals +1000% extra damage
• inflicts Burn for 4 seconds.

---

### **AOE: Full → AoE full**

description:

CRAFTING MATERIALS :

## Passives/Abilities:

Time Reversal : When Made In Heaven hits an enemy, there is a 10% chance to rewind the enemy to their previous position. After attacking 10 times, reduce made in heaven’s attack cooldown by 10%.

**Accelerated Fate : After reaching upgrade tier 5, made in heaven’s chance to rewind enemies changes to 40%, additionally, every attack permanently reduces its attack cooldown by .05% stacking infinitely.**

**Reset Universe ABILITY : When you activate this skill, all enemies on the map are sent back to their starting point, and every cooldown in the game is reduced to -50% second for 20 seconds.**

description:
**Makima (Control Devil) is a Heavenly unit inspired from chainsaw man. Can be obtained on the CSM banner with 0.0046% chance**

---


**Passives/Abilities:**

### **Wave Control (passive):**

Every wave passed increases Critical +5% and Damage +5  per wave (max 50%), 14% chance to apply Bleeding, and at max upgrade, increases damage +20% and Range +20%.

### **Charm Control (passive):**

Every attack has 10% chance to Charm. causing enemies to collide and take 15% of thier HP damage. if the enemy survives they take another 15% damage.
Deals +50% Damage to bosses, 20% critical Chance, and +50% Damage to Cursed enemies.

### **Ability : Devil Control :**

Deals 500% Damage and has +500% range, hitting all enemies on the map and pushes all enemies back to the start point.

description:
Nusjuro (Saint ethanborn) is a heavenly unit obtained from opening [https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR](https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR "smartCard-inline") with a 0.1% drop. He's a Character based from Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro from one peice (Anime/manga series).

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Frozen Dominion:**

**Forces enemies hit to be frozen for 2 seconds, each attack has a 9% chance to reduce the enemy’s attack by 30% for 15 seconds, his attacks also nullify enemy shields, the last enemy that leaves his range will be frozen for 2 seconds and take automatic damage based on his main damage once**

**Celestial Blessing:**

**Buffs all Five Elders units within his range, increasing their damage by 25%, additionally, summoned units within his range gain +100% HP**

**Eternal Iceblade:**

**Nusjuro cannot be stunned and cannot take damage from Bosses, he deals +99% more damage to Bosses, has a 9% chance to inflict Black Damage that deals 2.5× damage, and a 20% chance to deal a critical hit**

**Divine Convergence:**

**If all Five Elders Saturn (Saint Jaygarcia), Mars (Saint Marcus), Warcury (Saint Topman), Nusjuro (Saint Ethanbaron), and Ju Peter (Saint Shepherd) are present anywhere on the map from any player, all of them gain +300% damage**

**Ability:  Ultimate ethanborn:**

**Cooldown: 162s**

**Instantly gains +777% Damage, deals damage to all enemies on the map, freezes enemies for 55 seconds, and inflicts Frostbite Damage equal to 5% of base damage every 3 seconds until the freeze effect ends.**

---

name: Warcury (Saint Topman)
description:
Warcury  (Saint Topman) is a heavenly unit obtained from opening [https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR](https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR "smartCard-inline") with a 0.1% drop. He's a Character based from Topman Warcury from one peice (Anime/manga series).

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Wrath of the Immortal:**

**When any of the other Gorosei are defeated, Warcury's damage increases by +50%, stacking up to 5 times. This does not include himself, as Warcury cannot be damaged by Bosses and is immune to Stun.**

**Unbreakable Will:**

**Warcury's attacks nullify enemy Shields and restore his own HP whenever it is not full. He also deals +100% Damage against Bosses.**

**Divine Convergence:**

**If all Five Elders - Saturn (Saint Jaygarcia), Mars (Saint Marcus), Warcury (Saint Topman), Nusjuro (Saint Ethanbaron), and Ju Peter (Saint Shepherd) - are present anywhere on the map from any player, all of them gain +300% Damage:**

**Crimson Execution:**

**Warcury has a 20% chance to deal a Critical Hit. Enemies below 40% HP, whether Boss or normal, take +100% more Damage from his attacks.**

**Ability: Warcury Roar:**

**Cooldown: 170s**

**Instantly gains +677% Damage, deals damage to all enemies on the map, and grants all units 100% chance to inflict Black Damage x2.5 Damage for 30 seconds.**

---

---

**Celestial Authority:**

**When a Boss attacks Saturn, its damage is reduced by 4x and Saturn becomes immune to Stun.**

**Command of Reversal:**

**Saturn has a 10% chance on attack to command an enemy to retreat, forcing it to walk back to its previous position.**

**Divine Pressure:**

**Enemies within Saturn's range are constantly slowed and take automatic damage every 3 seconds based on his main damage.**

**Ability: Saturn Rain:**

**Cooldown: 144s**

**Instantly gains +333% Damage, deals continuous damage to all enemies on the map, and reduces all unit skill Cooldowns by 20% for 15 seconds.**

name: Yuichiro (Second Trumpet)
description:
Yuichiro (Second Trumpet) is a Heavenly  unit obtained from new banner with 0.0045%. he's a Character based from Yūichirō Hyakuy from seraph of the end (Anime/manga series).

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Blood Oath of the Seraph:**

**When Yuichiro kills an enemy, he absorbs their life force, restoring 20% HP and gaining +30% ATK for 8 seconds. Every time he kills 5 enemies, he gains Seraph Wrath, permanently increasing ATK by +5% (up to +50%).**

**Heavenfall Rampage:**

**Whenever Yuichiro casts an active skill, he enters Seraph Mode for 35 seconds, gaining +150% ATK, reducing Cooldown by -50%, and all attacks inflict guaranteed Black Damage (x2.5 Damage).**

**Demon's Surge:**

**Each attack grants Yuichiro +5% ATK (up to +50%). When reaching the limit, demonic energy explodes, dealing 200% ATK as Dark Damage to all nearby enemies.**



**Ability: Salt Trumpet:**

**Cooldown: 170s**

**Instantly gains +677% Damage, deals damage to all enemies on the map, and grants all units 100% chance to inflict Black Damage x2.5 Damage for 30 seconds.**

---

name: Saber (The Second Alter)
description:
Saber (The Second Alter) is a heavenly unit obtained by evolving Saber (Alter). She is inspired by **Saber** from the **Fate** Series.
Evolution Items :

_**1000xMystic Coins**_
_**1xAegis of Morgan**_
_**20xHoly Grail**_
_**1xExcalibur Morgan**_
_**5xSacrifice Essence**_
**200k Golden Chalice Coins**

---

### **Passives/Abilities:**

### **Darkened Core**

Each attack increases Saber’s damage by **3%** (up to **300%**).
Stacks reset if Saber is sold or removed.

### **Corrupted Ascension**

Saber gains **+1% Damage per second** while on the battlefield (up to **200%**).
The longer she fights, the stronger she becomes.

### **Blackened Blade**

Normal attacks apply a curse, causing enemies to take **+25% increased damage** from all sources.

### **Abyssal Pressure**
Enemies in range suffer **-30% Movement Speed** and **-15% Defense**.

---

### **Abilities:**

### **Control** (Cooldown: **1s**)

### **Excalibur Morgan**
Increase unit damage by **3500%** and deal damage to **all active enemies on the stage**.

### **Darkness Aura**
Increase unit damage by **500%**, grant **100% Critical Rate**, and increase **Max Health by 100% (stackable)** for **30 seconds**.
Instantly grant **100% Corrupted Gauge**.

name: Kurumi (Zafkiel)
description:
**Kurumi (Zafkiel) is Heaven rarity unit, She is based kurumi inspired from the anime Called (Date A Live)**

_**Obtainment: you can get the heaven kurumi from evoing your Exclusive Kurumi which is you can get from Nightmarket or doing the New event Called "Chronicles of Timeless Eternity game mode" upon completing the event there's a 10% chance to get the unit and also you need to do her quest which is you can find her npc outside the upgrade area in order to evo the exclusive kurumi into heaven Kurumi.**_

---

### **Passives/Abilities:**
**Eighth Bullet: Endless Time**

\*\*Every second Kurumi remain on the field, she gains  Time Stack (up to 20 stacks). Each stack increases ATK by 4% and improves SPA by 2%.

And Kurumi will become resistance to stuns.

When Time Stacks reach maximum:
\-All debuffs applied by Kurumi are 30% stronger.
\-These enhanced debuffs cannot be removed. The longer the batte last, the more kurumi dominates the flow of time itself.

### Zafkiel: Dominion of Time

Each attack applies 1 Temporal Seal stack to enemies
(up to 10 stacks).
Each stack reduces movement speed by 6% and increases damage taken by 7%

Upon reaching 10 stacks, the next attack triggers "Time Rupture", dealing 500% ATK damage.
\-normal enemies are inflicted with Stun for 3 seconds.
\-Bosses are not stunned, but instead suffer
\-60% movement speed -40% damage dealt.
All Temporal Seal stacks are then refreshed

Enemies within range are permanently afflicted with " Time Corrosion", taking +60% increased damage.

Each time kurumi successfully Stun an enemy, she gains 1 Dominion Stack (up to 15 stacks).
Each stack increases ATK aby 8% and Stun chance by 5%.

At maximum Dominion \*\*Stacks
**-Gain an additional +50% ATK.**
**-increase Stun duration by +1.5 seconds.**
**-All debuffs applied by Kurumi cannot be removed.**
**-Kurumi becomes immune to Stun from enemies.**

---

### **Control:**
**Cooldown: 1s**

**Aleph - Reduce Kurumi's SPA by 100%**

**Bet - Kurumi becomes permanently invinsible.**

**Gimel - increase Kurumi's ATK by 300% (permanently)**

**Dalet - Stun all enemies for 30 seconds.**

**He - Remove all enemy shields instantly.**

**Vav - Decrease all enemies Max HP by 15%**

**Zayin - increase Yod stun duration by +10 seconds (can stack up to +30 seconds.)**

**Het - Reduce all enemies movement speed by 50% for 20 seconds**

**Tet - Grant Kurumi 100%, increase damage. (Permanently)**

**Yod - Stun all enemies in range for 10 seconds and increase Kurumi's ATK by 50%**

**Yod Bet - Return all enemies to the spawn point.**

**Yod Gimel - Grant kurumi 4000% ATK and all enemies on the stage once.**

---

name: Itachi (Uchiha)
description:
Itachi (Uchiha) is a limited unit that is obtained trough the [https://trello.com/c/0gaSnHAd/57-itachi-capsule](https://trello.com/c/0gaSnHAd/57-itachi-capsule "smartCard-inline")   at a 0.1% chance. He is based off _**Itachi Uchiha**_ from _**Naruto**_

---

## Passives/Abilities:

#### **Hellfire Chain : Each attack has a 20% chance to inflict Normal fire for 4 hits, dealing 10% of the unit’s base damage per hit. Each time normal fire is applied, theres a 20% chance to also inflict Black Flame, dealing 2% of base damage per tick. Black flame never expires and lasts until the enemy dies (Can stack.)**

#### **Abyssal Curse : whenever this character is placed, there is a 50% chance to inflict black damage, at max upgrade this becomes 100%. Deals 2x damage to non-boss enemies, this character can also not be stunned.**

#### **Cursed Raven arts : Each time this unit attacks, it gains 5% energy, up to a maximum of 100%. When using the skill, it summons a raven clone at the player’s base. If energy is at 100% when activating the skill, all enemies on the map are frozen for 20 seconds. then take 1 instance of damage equal to 3x this unit’s base damage, after the skill the energy resets to 0 and has to build up again.**

#### **ABILITY : Mangekyo Sharingan (60s, player cooldown)**

#### **When using the skill, When using the skill, it summons a raven clone at the player’s base. If energy is at 100% when activating the skill, all enemies on the map are frozen for 20 seconds. then take 1 instance of damage equal to 3x this unit’s base damage, after the skill the energy resets to 0 and has to build up again.**

**Monarch’s Dominion** : Upon deployment, this unit buffs all allies that inflict Bleed, increasing their bleed damage by 50%. (Including Itself). Each Attack has a 20% chance to apply Bleed twice, Deals 50% more damage to non-boss enemies. Instantly removes enemy shields, If the target is afflicted with Frostbite (Inflicted By Ragna), which prevents health regeneration, this unit deals 1.2x more damage.
**Monarch’s Talon** : Each time Gilzea attacks, enemies are inflicted with Bleed, losing 15% of their max HP over 4 seconds. While enemies are bleeding, Gilzea’s attacks deal 2x damage to them.

name: Ragna (The Reaper)
description:
Ragna is an Secret unit who is obtained from the [https://trello.com/c/z9tOLK4e/115-ragna-capsule](https://trello.com/c/z9tOLK4e/115-ragna-capsule "smartCard-inline")   at a 0.01% Chance, he is based off **Ragna** from **Ragna Crimson**

---

#### **Passives / Abilities :**

**Reaper’s Awakening :** When Ragna’s Power Meter reaches 100% or higher, his attack range is permanently increased by 50%. This bonus does not dissapear and cannot be increased further. Additionally, Ragna deals 100% more damage to bosses.

**Silver Domination** : Everytime this unit attacks, enemies are stunned with a 100% chance for 1 second, However when Ragna’s Power Meter reaches 50% or higher, the stun duration increases to 3 seconds instead. Additionally, everytime  Ragna attacks a frozen enemy, his damage increases permanently by 0.1%, stacking infinitely.

**Anti-Regeneration Seal :** Upon reaching Upgrade Tier 4, everytime Ragna attacks, he applies a debuff that prevents the enemy from regenerating HP for 10 seconds. (In other words, the enemy cannot heal during this time.)

**Silver Surge :** Everytime Ragna attacks, he gains 0.5% Power for each enemy hit. The more enemies he hits, the more Power he gains.

---

name: Miyabi (Hoshimi)
description:
Miyabi (Hoshimi) is a Secret unit obtained by opening the [https://trello.com/c/JpcxKyfF/163-summer-capsule](https://trello.com/c/JpcxKyfF/163-summer-capsule "smartCard-inline")   at 0.1% chance. She is based off **Miyabi** from **Zenless Zone Zero**

---

# Passives/Abilities :

#### **Frostburn Enchant : Every attack from Miyabi applies Frostburn, dealing 20% burn damage and slowing the enemy by 50% for 2s. Can stack up to 4 stacks (slow effect does not stack.) When attacking an enemy with 4 stacks of Frostburn, the remaining burn damage is triggered instantly, dealing an immediate 200% damage, and all 4 stacks are removed.**

‌

**Endless Frostburn : At Upgrade Lv.5+, the maximum Frostburn stacks is increased from 4 to unlimited. Every 4 stacks will automatically trigger an explosion, dealing 200% damage to the enemy. Each stack adds +4% bonus damage to the explosion. In Short, the more stacks you have, the stronger the explosion will be, exceeding 200% Damage.**

‌

**ABILITY : Lingering Frost :**

**When using this ability, all Frostburn stacks from every enemy within range are absorbed, granting +2% ATK for each stack. This damage buff lasts for 120s, after which your damage returns to normal. after absorption, all Frostburn stacks on enemies are removed.**

---

description:
Yuta is a **Secret** unit who is obtained by reaching level 50 in the battlepass, he is based off **Yuta Okkutsu** from **Jujutsu Kaisen**

---

## Passives/Abilities:

#### **Cursed Weakening :**

Whenever an enemy gains a CurseMark, there is a 10% chance to apply a Weakening Curse (same style as sukuna), causing the target to take +20% more damage for 5s. When Yuta attacks Boss-type enemies, his damage is increased by +125% (total 2.25x).

#### **Cursed Mark Accumulation :**

On every attack, Yuta applies CurseMark to the target, Re-hitting the same target adds a stack; stacks naturally expire after 10s. Yuta deals +10% Damage per CurseMark stack on that target; when the target no longer has CurseMark, the bonus returns to normal. Each attack also has a 10% chance to inflict Black Damage (deals 2.5x  damage) and a 15% chance to critical Hit.

#### **Ability : Cursed Energy :**

Randomly increases their own damage between 1000% and 2500%, then rapidly attacks across the entire map. After the attack ends, the bonus damage returns to normal. (165s Player Cooldown)

---

name: Ellen Joe (ZZZ)
description:
Ellen Joe (ZZZ) is a Secret obtained from [https://trello.com/c/XYSiDMId](https://trello.com/c/XYSiDMId "smartCard-inline")  that drop from [https://trello.com/c/KjVx7atM](https://trello.com/c/KjVx7atM "smartCard-inline") . She is a Character based from Ellen Joe from Zenless Zone Zero.

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Killing Tempo Each time Ellen Joe lands a Critical Hit, she gains 1 stack of Killing Tempo (expires after 5s of inactivity). Upon reaching 5 stacks, her next attack becomes Full-AOE, dealing Critical Damage x2.0 to all enemies in range and Freezing them for 2s.**

**Frost Mark When an enemy is hit by Ellen Joe's Critical Attack, apply Frost Mark for 10s. Her next attack against a marked target deals +100% Additional Damage and is Guaranteed to Crit.**

**Ability: Frost End**

**Cooldown: 160s**

**Unleashes a full-map attack, increasing her own Damage by +442% instantly, and Freezes all enemies for 30 seconds in a single strike.**

---

name: Echinda
description:
Echidna is inspired from Echidna from the anime show _Re:Zero_.

**She can be Obtained by claiming her unit once you complete the season 6 battlepass (free tier).**

---

## **Passives/Abilities:**

**Butterfly Points:**

**Enemies within range grant Butterfly Points equal**
**to**
**10% of their Max HP.**
**Damage increases at thresholds:**

> **1,000,000 → +90%**
> **5,000,000 → +120%**
> **10,000,000 → +140%**
> **20,000,000 → +180%**
> **50,000,000 → +222% (Max)**

**If the enemy HP is below 90%, no Butterfly Points are gained. Works on bosses as well.**
**(Added Damage applies only to the extra damage enemies receive. It does NOT increase Echidna's own Base Damage.)**


**Greedy Butterflies:**

**Each attack applies a Green Butterfly mark. Every mark increases Damage dealt to any enemy by +10%.**
**Can stack up to +100% total bonus Damage.**


**Ability: Stardust Explosion:**

**Cooldown: 160s**

**Consumes all of the player's Yen and deals damage based on the amount:**

**200,000 Yen→ 1,000% Damage (Full-map, 1 hit)**
**750,000 Yen→ 5,000% Dumage (Full-map, 1 hit)**
**2,000,000 Yen→ 100.000% Domage (Full-map, 1 hit)**

**If the Yen is below any threshold, the skill's cooldown is increased by 100%.**

**(Added Damage applies only to the extra damage enemies receive. It does increase Echidna's own Base Damage.)**

---

name: Kafka (HSR)
description:
Kafka (HSR) is a exclusive unit obtained by crafting them or rolling for them at the Spinning Wheel, they are based off **Kafka** from **Honkai Star Rail**

---

## Passives/Abilities:

**Marionette's Order: Each time Kafka attacks, there is a 10% chance to charm the enemy. A charmed enemy will attack its own allies with 1 attack, dealing 15% of its own Max HP as damage. Charmed enemies can also collide with other enemies, causing them to take damage. (Boss enemies cannot be charmed). When Kafka attacks enemies already afflicted with a DoT damage effect (Shock, Burn, Bleed), her attack deals +100% increased damage.**

**Resonant Shock: Every time Kafka attacks, enemies have a 20% chance to be inflicted with Shock, which deals 75% of Kafka's ATK as damage every second for 5 seconds. If a shocked enemy is attacked again, Kafka deals an additional +30% damage. Enemies afflicted by Shock are stunned for the entire duration of the Shock. If a shocked enemy survives until the Shock ends, it will explode, dealing 150% of Kafka's ATK as AoE damage around it.**

**Ability: Uzi- Ultimate**

**Cooldown: 240s**

**Increases her own damage by +500% and rapidly attacks across the entire map. After the attack ends, the bonus damage returns to normal.**

‌

name: Mars (Saint Marcus)
description:
Mars (Saint Marcus) is a exclusive unit obtained from opening [https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR](https://trello.com/c/XYcE6ntR "smartCard-inline") with a 0.1% drop. He's a Character based from  Marcus Mars from one piece (Anime/manga series).

---

**Passives/Abilities:**

**Infernal Retribution:**

**Mars deals +144% Damage against Bosses and has a 15% chance to inflict Burn on hit. He is immune to Stun. When defeated, the enemy that kills him instantly takes 5x his main damage as retaliation.**

**Flames of Domination:**

**Each time Mars attacks a Boss, there is a 9% chance to steal 100% of the Boss's damage and convert it into his own damage boost for 20 seconds, after which his power returns to normal.**

**Judgment of the War God:**

**If an enemy is close to the final waypoint and within Mars's range, it will be instantly sent back to the start. This effect only applies to Normal Enemies and Bosses with less than 40% HP.**

**Divine Convergence:**

**If all Five Elders - Saturn (Saint Jaygarcia), Mars (Saint Marcus), Warcury (Saint Topman), Nusjuro (Saint Ethanbaron), and Ju Peter (Saint Shepherd) - are present anywhere on the map from any player, all of them gain +300% Damage..**

**Ability: Marcus:**

**Cooldown: 145s**

**Steals 100% of the Boss's total damage permanently within range, and instantly gains +1000% Damage, dealing heavy damage to nearby enemies.**

# Passives/Abilities :

#### Ultra Bleeding : When Berserk points reach 15 or more, attacks will inflict Bleed status. Bleed damage scales based on the percentage of current Berserk Points.

#### Berserk Mode : Each time this unit attacks a normal enemy, it gains 5 berserk points. Attacking a boss grants 10 points instead. If there are no enemies to attack, Berserk points will decrease by 1 every second until the unit attacks again (Berserk points cap 100%)

#### True Mode (Auto Skills) : When Berserk points reach 100%, activating Berserk Mode increases this unit’s damage by 100% and reduces skill cooldowns by 10%. Upon activation, it unleashes a burst of power that stuns enemies for 5 seconds. While berserk mode is active, berserk points no longer increase and instead decrease by 2 points every .5 seconds until reaching 0.

---

---

#### **Passives / Abilities :**

**Reaper’s Awakening :** When Ragna’s Power Meter reaches 100% or higher, his attack range is permanently increased by 50%. This bonus does not dissapear and cannot be increased further. Additionally, Ragna deals 100% more damage to bosses.

**Silver Domination** : Everytime this unit attacks, enemies are stunned with a 100% chance for 1 second, However when Ragna’s Power Meter reaches 50% or higher, the stun duration increases to 3 seconds instead. Additionally, everytime  Ragna attacks a frozen enemy, his damage increases permanently by 0.1%, stacking infinitely.

**Anti-Regeneration Seal :** Upon reaching Upgrade Tier 4, everytime Ragna attacks, he applies a debuff that prevents the enemy from regenerating HP for 10 seconds. (In other words, the enemy cannot heal during this time.)

**Silver Surge :** Everytime Ragna attacks, he gains 0.5% Power for each enemy hit. The more enemies he hits, the more Power he gains.

**ABILITY :**
**Full Silver Saint :** Deals 500% damage in a single hit, (attacks the entire map and stops enemies for 30 seconds.) 190s cooldown, Player cooldown.

# Passives/Abilities :

#### Shadow Emperor : At Upgrade Lv.5+, Sung’s attacks inflict a slow effect on enemies hit. The slow lasts for 2s and can be refreshed with each attack. The more enemies affected by slow, the more bonus damage Sung deals to non-boss enemies, up to 200%

#### System Control : Each time Sung kills an enemy, a Shadow Knight is summoned instantly (up to 12 units), The more knights summoned, the faster their speed increases by a certain 5%

#### Endless Evolution : Each kill permanently increases Sung’s damage by +1% with no limit. Shadow Knight HP scales with Sung’s damage : 50% of his damage becomes their HP.

name: Gilgamesh (The Strongest King)
description:
Gilgamesh (The Strongest King) is a guardian unit inspired by **Gilgamesh** from the **Fate** Series.

---

_**Obtainable by evolving Gilgamesh(King of the Heroes) into Gilgamesh (The Strongest King)**_
_**His materials to evolve:**_
_**1xGilgamesh Ship**_
_**1xEnuma Elish**_
_**20xHoly Grail**_
_**5xSacrifice Essence**_
_**1000xMystic Coins**_
**200k golden chalice coins**

---

## **Passives/Abilities:**

### **Energy of the King**

Each attack grants **5% Divinity** (up to **100%**).
When reaching **100%**, Gilgamesh gains **+500% Damage** and **-20% SPA** for **20 seconds**.
After activation, Divinity resets back to **0%**.

### **King of Heroes Ascension**

Gilgamesh gains +2% ATK every second while he remains on the battlefield
(up to 500%). The longer he stays, the more he grows into a walking catastrophe.
His normal attacks release power from the Treasury, unleashing 3-6 follow-up hits.
Each extra hit deals 350% ATK as true damage, ignoring all defenses, including shields, armor, and every protective state.
His royal aura weakens nearby enemies:
\-20% Max HP and -50% Movement Speed, making it nearly impossible for them to approach him.
When taking damage, golden armor activates automatically, reflecting all incoming damage
to enemies in range. Those hit are counterattacked with damage equal to Gilgamesh's current ATK. Gilgamesh cannot be stunned.
Every kill within his radius grants +5% ATK permanently (up to 500%), allowing him
to become increasingly unstoppable the more he slaughters.

---

### **Abilities:**

### **Control** (Cooldown: **1s**) this ability give access to next ability:

### **Enuma Elish**

Increase unit damage by **900%** and deal damage to **ALL active enemies on the stage**.

### **Divine Treasure**

Increase unit damage by **555%** and grant **100% Critical Chance**
for **30 seconds**.

### **Gate of Babylon**

Instantly grant **100% Divinity** and increase unit damage by **450%**
for **30 seconds**.

---

name: Zero Two (Strelizia Apus)
description:
Zero Two (Strelizia Apus) is a secret unit who is obtained by evolving Zero Two (Code 002). She is inspired by **Zero Two** from **Darling in the Franxx**.
**Evolution Materials :**

**1000xMystic Coins**
**1xStrelitzia Alba**
**1xQueen Pike**

---

### **Passives/Abilities:**

### **Apus Deployment Protocol**

Upon deployment:
**+300% DMG**
**+25% Range**
**-10% SPA**
Deals **+100% damage to Boss enemies**.
Zero Two becomes **immune to Stun effects** inflicted by enemies.

### **Overheat Cataclysm**

Each attack generates **1 Overheat stack**.
Overheat is displayed as a second gauge in the Info GUI.
For every **10 Overheat stacks**:
**+20% Damage** and **+10% Attack Speed**.

When Overheat reaches **30 stacks**, Zero Two enters a critical state.
After **5 seconds**, Strelizia Apus **self-destructs**, dealing
**TRUE DAMAGE equal to 200,000%** across the entire map.
All non-boss enemies are **instantly eliminated**.
Boss enemies receive damage but are **not removed**.

### **Crimson Frenzy**

Each attack consumes **2% Max HP** to generate **1 Crimson Charge stack**.
Crimson Charge increases damage by **+5% per stack** (up to **20 stacks**).
Stacks do **not decay** over time.

When HP falls below **40%**, attacks consume **Crimson Charge instead of HP**
(**1 stack per attack**) and deal **+100% additional damage**.

When HP drops below **20%**, all attacks become **Full AOE**
and deal **Bleed Damage equal to 75%** for **10 seconds**.

---

### **Abilities:**

### **Until the End of Us**

Cooldown: **200s**
Increase unit damage by **50% (Stackable)**.
Additional damage is applied to **all active enemies on the stage**.

---

name: Ainz (The Goal Of All Life Is Death)
description:
**Ainz (The Goal Of All Life Is Death) is a guardian unit inspired by Ainz Oal Gown from Overlord**

---

**How to obtain Ainz**

**To get Ainz you need to do the new gamemode and he's dropped from it as the one named "Ainz's team" and  you need to evo him into Ainz (overlord) after you can evo him into Ainz (The Goal Of All Life Is Death)**

---

### **Passives**

### **Item Cash**

**When the player's yen reaches 1,000,000+ every 10,000 Yen grants 1 Yen Stack (Maximum 300 Yen Stacks).**
**If Yen drops below 1,000,000 Yen Stacks reset to 0**

**At 100+ Yen Stacks and 1,000,000+ Yen, Ainz begins casting a spell. During casting, Yen Stacks are locked. If Yen drops below 1,000,000 casting is canceled.**

**On successful cast, Ainz releases Nazarick Million Collapse, dealing 999% of base ATK to all enemies in range.**

**If Ainz has 200+ Yen Stacks, it deals an additional of 250% base ATK and inflicts Absolute Despair, causing enemies to take  200% more damage for 15 seconds.**

**After casting, player's Yen deceases by Yen Stacks × 10,000. If Yen falla below 200,000, Ainz suffers Treasury Exhaustion, reducing base ATK by 15% for 6 seconds.**

### **Lord Of The Death**

**Ainz gains Overlord Authority whenever an enemy dies within his range. (Maximum 50 Stacks).**

**Ainz summons a Dark Knight every 3 waves. When Dark Knight hits an enemy, it deals 15% of their HP as damage.**

**At 10 stacks, Dark Knight and Dark Young deals an additional 3% of the enemy's HP as damage.**

**At 15 stacks, Buff ATK by 90%, SPA down by 50% and increase army walkspeed by 100%.**

**At 20 stacks, when Dark Knight or Dark Young dies. They explode, dealing 4% of the army's max HP to nearby enemies.**

**At 25 stacks, Ainz gains +90% ATK and +150% army walkspeed.**

**At 30 stacks, Ainz summons Dark Young alongside Dark Knight every 3 waves, and their attacks now deal 25% HP.**

### **True Death Percentage**

**Normal attacks deals an additional 0.7% of enemy max HP as bonus damage.**

**If the enemy has more than 70% HP, the bonus damage increases to 1%.**

**If Ainz has 20+ Overlord Authority stacks, the bonus damage becomes 1.5% of Max HP.**

### **Guardian Blessing**

**This unit can not get stunned.**

---

### **Abilities**

### **Control; 1 second cooldown**

### **Time Sovereignty**

### **Freezes all enemies for 10 seconds and return them back to their spawnpoint.**

### **Frozen World Edict**

### **Stun all enemies for 10 seconds and deal 1000% damage constantly while active.**

---

name: Rimuru (True dragon)
description:
**Rimuru (True Dragon)** is inspired from the anime **That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime**. You can obtain him by evolving him from his secret form.

---

### **Passives**

### Void Authority - Devour Continuum

_**Every 5 hits inflicts a Devour Mark (maximum 5 marked enemies at once).**_

_**Marked enemies take 15% increased damage from Rimuru.**_

_**If a marked enemy dies, it explodes dealing5% of Max HP to nearby enemies, and Rimuru gains 10 Imaginary Data stacks.**_

_**If 3 or more enemies are marked, Rimuru releases Void Pulse, dealing 180% of base ATK to nearby enemies.**_

## **Imaginary Computation Core**

_**Rimuru gains Imaginary Data whenever attacking an enemy, and gains an additional stack if the enemy has a special status effect.(Maximum 200 stacks).**_

_**Every 20 stacks increases Rimuru's damage by 8%.At 100 stacks, gain an additional 40% damage, and another 80% at 200 stacks.**_

_**At 60 stacks, attacks inflict Void Erosion (max 3 stacks),causing enemies to lose Stack Amount% of their HP every second for 3seconds (duration refreshes on hit).**_

_**At 100 stacks, attacking the same target 4 times triggers Imaginary Collapse, dealing 6% of Max HP**_

_**At 100 stacks, attacking the same target 4 times triggersImaginary Collapse, dealing 6% of Max HP(8-second cooldown per target).**_

_**At 150 stacks, enemies dying within range triggerVoid Burst, dealing 1% of Max HPto nearby enemies, and Rimuru instantly gains 5 Imaginary Data stacks.**_

_**At 200 stacks, Rimuru entersTrue Imaginary Dominion, gaining 35% increased damage.Additionally, every 25 stacks beyond 100 grant another 5% damage.**_

_**This unit can not be stun.**_

𝘿𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙣𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙝𝙤𝙡𝙙𝙨 (𝙠𝙞𝙡𝙡-𝙗𝙖𝙨𝙚𝙙) • 10 𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙣𝙩𝙨: 100% 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚

• 20 𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙣𝙩𝙨: 150% 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚

•50 𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙣𝙩𝙨: 200% 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚

𝘿𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙞𝙨 𝙙𝙞𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙩 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚, 𝙣𝙤𝙩 𝙖 𝙗𝙪𝙛𝙛.

𝘿𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙧𝙖𝙙𝙞𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚:
𝙀𝙖𝙘𝙝 𝙖𝙩𝙩𝙖𝙘𝙠 𝙖𝙥𝙥𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙃𝙤𝙡𝙮 𝙇𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩.
𝙀𝙣𝙚𝙢𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙖𝙛𝙛𝙡𝙞𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙖𝙠𝙚 +100% 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚
𝘼𝙣𝙙 𝙨𝙪𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧 𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙪𝙤𝙪𝙨 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙖𝙡 𝙩𝙤 90% 𝙤𝙛 𝙍𝙚𝙞𝙣𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙙'𝙨 𝙗𝙖𝙨𝙚 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙪𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙡 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙚𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙘𝙩 𝙚𝙭𝙥𝙞𝙧𝙚𝙨.

𝙍𝙚𝙞𝙣𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙙 𝙜𝙖𝙞𝙣𝙨 𝘿𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙧𝙜𝙮 𝙗𝙮 5% 𝙥𝙚𝙧 𝙖𝙩𝙩𝙖𝙘𝙠, 𝙪𝙥 𝙩𝙤 100%.

𝘼𝙩 100%, 𝙍𝙚𝙞𝙣𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙙 𝙜𝙖𝙞𝙣𝙨 200% 𝙙𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙛𝙤𝙧 20 𝙨𝙚𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙙𝙨.

𝘼𝙛𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙙𝙪𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙚𝙣𝙙𝙨, 𝙙𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙧𝙜𝙮 𝙍𝙚𝙨𝙚𝙩𝙨.

**Ability: Dragon Sword Reid:**

**Cooldown: 180s**

**Unleashes Reinhard's full, limitless power.**

**Strikes all enemies using the sacred blade, The Sword Saint Chosen by the World.**

**Gains a one-time +5000% self damage boost and inflicts Holy Light permanently on every attack.**

name: Cartethyia (Echo of Oblivion)
description:
**Cartethyia (Echo Of Oblivion) is a limited unit obtained from the Cartethyia Wheel Spin**, **she is inspired by Cartethyia from the game Wuthering Waves**

---

##### _To get Cartethyia find her npc which is the wheel spin and then there's a chance to get the unit and also if you have enough materials you can craft the unit instead._

**To craft her you need;**
x25 Halo of Oblivion [https://trello.com/c/WvoDs7So/338-halo-of-oblivion](https://trello.com/c/WvoDs7So/338-halo-of-oblivion "smartCard-inline")
x200 trait reroll [https://trello.com/c/jJbJJjem/306-rerolls](https://trello.com/c/jJbJJjem/306-rerolls "smartCard-inline")
x250 mythic coins [https://trello.com/c/2j2aj46P/43-mystical-coins](https://trello.com/c/2j2aj46P/43-mystical-coins "smartCard-inline")
x250,000 coins [https://trello.com/c/OrxTPOgX/317-gold](https://trello.com/c/OrxTPOgX/317-gold "smartCard-inline")
x250,000 gems [https://trello.com/c/3a2DGyi7/316-gems](https://trello.com/c/3a2DGyi7/316-gems "smartCard-inline")

---

### **Resonance of the End**

**Every 3 seconds Cartethyia remains on the field, she gains 1 Resonance Stack (up to 15 stacks).**
**Each Resonance Stack increases ATK by 5% and increases damage dealt to enemies affected by Oblivion Mark by 6%**
**Upon reaching 15 stacks: - All attacks and skills deal additional Echo Damage equal to**
**35% ATK (triggered once per hit). - Oblivion Mark no longer expires.**
_**All effects persist until Cartethyia leaves the field. The longer the battle continues, the more her damage multiplies and overwhelms her enemies.**_

### **Echoes of Oblivion**

**Each attack by Cartethyia applies 1 Oblivion Mark to enemies (up to 8 stacks).**
**Each stack increases damage taken from Cartethyia by 8%.**
**Upon reaching 8 stacks, the next attack or skill releases Oblivion Echo, dealing**
**450% ATK damage to the target and**
**220% ATK reflected damage to surrounding enemies (50% of range).**
**All Oblivion Mark stacks are then refreshed.**
**If an enemy is defeated while affected by Oblivion Mark, Cartethyia gains**
**+25% ATK for 6 seconds.**
_**All effects scale directly with ATK and can trigger repeatedly whenever stacks reach maximum.**_

### **Split The Heavens**

**-Deals 5000% damage in a single activation, hitting enemies 10 times simultaneously**
**and attacking all enemies**
**across the entire map.**

#### **Against The Tide**

- **Applies Conviction to**
  **enemies,**
  **causing them to take 200% increased damage**
  **from all sources**
  **for 50 seconds.\*\***

---

name: jin mori (sun wukong)
description:
**Jin mori (Sun Wukong) is a limited type unit he is based off Jin Mori from The God of Highschool**, **same as the others look around for his npc and when you do talk to him get his quest and after that do the new event called "Three Gods Boss" in order to get his scroll the event rotates every hour so be patient.**

---

### **Passives:**

### **Monkey King Multiform:**

_**When Combo Stacks reach 10/15/20, jin Mori summons 1/2/3 Multiform Clones for 6 seconds.**_
_**Clones attack the same target as kin Mori, dealing 40% of his actual damage and are able to apply all types of effects.**_
_**when Jin Mori or his clones attack a Boss, they deal additional True Damage equal to 10% of the target's current HP per attack.**_
_**When Multiform ends, all clones detonate with Money King impact, dealing True Damage equal to 30% of current HP to all enemies within range**_

### **Heavenly Martial Mastery:**

_**Each of jin Mori's attacks grants 1 Combo Stack for 5 seconds Each stack increases total damage by +5% and attack speed by +5% Can stack up to 20 stacks.**_
_**Every 5 hits, jin Mori unleashes Heavenly Strike, dealing True Damage equal to 15% of the target's current HP (7.5% for bosses).**_
_**When Combo Stacks are at maximum, Jin Mori does not lose stacks when switching targets, and all his attacks cannot miss.**_

---

###
**Control:**

- **Skill 1 - Sun Wukong's Grin:**
  _**Constantly deal damage to all enemies active on the stage • inflicts Stun for 20 seconds.**_
- **Skill 2 - Cloud-Born Thunder:**
  _**Deals 5000% damage to all enemies active on the stage  inflicts Electric Shock for 4 seconds.**_

name: Broly (Legendary super saiyan)
description:
**Broly (Legendary Super Saiyan) is a limited unit obtained from his questline. You need a scroll which you can obtain from the “3 gods” mode and after obtaining it, look around the lobby and accept his quest. He is based off Broly** from **Dragon Ball.**

**His scroll is →** Legendary Super Saiyan scroll.

---

### **Passives/Abilities:**

### **Unstoppable Berserker:**

**While broly has at least 10 rage stacks, all attacks become impact AoE.**

**Damage increases based on the number of enemies in range, granting an additional +6% damage per enemy hit.**

**When attacking Boss or Elite enemies, broly deals an additional True Damage equal to 20% of the damage dealt.**

**Whenever broly defeats an enemy, he restores 10% of his current HP and extends the duration of a Rage stacks by 2 seconds.**

**While in Legendary Awakening:**
**-All attacks gain unlimited Pierce.**
**-Enemies hit are afflicted with fear for 2 seconds, causing them to take +35% increased damage.**

### **Legendary Rage Core:**

**While broly is on the field, he gains Rage stacks each time he attacks or takes damage.**

**Each Rage stack increases total damage by +4% and attack speed by +3%**

**Can stack up to 30 stacks.**
**Rage lasts for 8 seconds and is refreshed whenever broly attacks.**

**At 15 Rage stacks, Broly gains 50% resistance to all damage reduction effects and crowd control effects.**

**At 30 Rage stacks, Broly enters Legendary Awakening for 6 seconds.**

**During this state, he gains an additional +60% total damage and cannot have his attacks interrupted**

---

### **Control**

### **Skill 1 - Gigantic catastrophe:**

**• Unit gives itself 300% max HP**
**• Attacks all active enemies on the map.**

### **Skill 2 -Gigantic Ball**

**• Unit gives itself 300% max HP**
**• Attacks all active enemies on the map.**

---

name: Frieren (Thousand Years)
description:
**Frieren (Thousand Years) is a limited type Rarity unit, she is based of Frieren from Frieren : Beyond Journey's End**

---

_**In order to get the limited  frieren you need to get her as a mythic first, go to Summon and interact with the npc (Escanor) and then spin for her,once you got the mythic type after that find the frieren npc in the lobby,once you found her npc interact with it and you need to do her quest in order to get the limited type frieren.**_

---

### **Passives/Abilities:**

**Endless Arcane Accumulation:**

**Every 4 seconds Frieren remains on the field, she gains 1 Timeaccumulation Stack**
**(Up to 20 stacks).**

**Each stack increases ATK by 4% and SPA by 3%.**

**Stacks do not decay.**

**Upon reaching 10 stacks:**
**-Magic Damage +20%**
**-Magic Damage cannot be reduced**

**Upon reaching 20 stacks:**
**-Additional ATK +30%**
**Attacks and skills deal 40% repeated damage.**

**All effects persist while frieren remain on the field**

### **Legacy of a Thousand Spells:**

**Every attack or cast grants 1 Ancient Spell Stack (up to 12 stacks)**

**Each stack increases ATK BY 5% and Magic Damage by 6%**

**Upon reaching 12 stacks, the next attack or skill unleashes Ancient Arcane Release,dealing 380% ATK Magic Damage**
**To enemies in range causing them to take  25% Increased Magic Damage for 6 seconds.**

**After the activation all stacks are reset and Frieren gains:**

**- ATK +20%**

- **SPA +15%**
  **For 8 seconds**

**Ancient Arcane release deals 15% more damage**
**Per enemy hit (up to 75%)**
**And increases units range by 20% ( Can only be trigger once).**

### **All effects scale with ATK and can be triggered again after fully stacking.**

**Control:**

### **Judrajim:**

**• Consecutively deal 1999% damage to all enemies on the stage and increase Critical Chance +100%.**

### Black Hole:

• **Consecutively deal 2999% damage to all enemies on the stage and increase Unit Max Health +300%.**

𝙋𝙤𝙬𝙚𝙧 𝙂𝙖𝙪𝙜𝙚 𝙘𝙖𝙣 𝙤𝙣𝙡𝙮 𝙗𝙚 𝙜𝙖𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙝𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙜𝙝 𝙬𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙨𝙞𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣𝙨, 𝙜𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜 +15% 𝙥𝙚𝙧 𝙬𝙖𝙫𝙚.

𝘼𝙩 100%, 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙗𝙤𝙨𝙨𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙢𝙖𝙥 𝙖𝙧𝙚 𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙡𝙮 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙯𝙚𝙣.

𝘼𝙗𝙨𝙤𝙡𝙪𝙩𝙚 𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙡𝙡𝙣𝙚𝙨𝙨:
𝘼𝙡𝙡 𝙣𝙤𝙣-𝙗𝙤𝙨𝙨 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙢𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣 𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙜𝙚 𝙍𝙚𝙜𝙪𝙡𝙪𝙨 𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙜𝙚 𝙖𝙧𝙚 𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙡𝙮 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙯𝙚𝙣.

name: Zero Two (Code 002)
description:
**Zero Two (Code 002) is a secret unit obtained from her event. She is inspired by Zero Two from Darling in the Franxx**

---

### **Passives/Abilities**:

### **Crimson Frenzy**:

**Each attack consumes 2% Max hp**
**(Max-based) to generate 1 Crimson Charge stack.**

**Each Crimson Charge increases attack damage by +5% per stack. Stacks can accumulate up to 20 stacks and do not decay over time.**

**When HP falls below 40%, attacks consume Crimson Charge instead of HP**

**(1 stack per attack).**
**Attacks in this state deal an additional +100%  damage.**

**When HP drops below 20%, all attacks become Full AoE and deal Black damage equal to 75% for 10 seconds.**

**If Crimson Charge is depleted and zero Two continues attacking, HP cost increases to 4% Max HP per attack.**
